Part.Source:
&HttpClient = new() &HttpClient.AddHeader('Projeto','ERP_JASPI') &HttpClient.Execute(HttpMethod.Get,'https://adm.jaspi.com.br/version/all')
//&HttpClient.AddHeader('Projeto','JASPICHAT') //&HttpClient.Execute(HttpMethod.Get,'http://192.168.100.46/ADM_JASPI.NetEnvironment/version/all')
if &HttpClient.ErrCode = 0 &sdtVersionAPI.FromJson(&HttpClient.ToString())
if &sdtVersionAPI.error.code = 0 do 'ImportaCompilacoes' do 'ImportaItensDaCompilacao' do 'SyncronizaLocalComNuvem' commit else padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ERROApi#', 0, &WwpContext.EmpCod, &sdtVersionAPI.error.description, &Today) endif else &Mensagem = Trim(Str(&HTTPClient.StatusCode)) +' - '+ &HTTPClient.ErrDescription padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ERROHttp#', 0, &WwpContext.EmpCod, &Mensagem, &Today) endif
Sub 'ImportaCompilacoes' for &sdtCompilacao in &sdtVersionAPI.compilacoes for each order VerCod where VerCod = &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao if VerDtaUltSync < &sdtCompilacao.ultima_modificacao VerIsLid = True VerDtaLct = &sdtCompilacao.lancamento VerDtaUltSync = &sdtCompilacao.ultima_modificacao &sdtCompilacao.isAtualizar = true endif exit when none New VerCod = &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao VerCmp = &sdtCompilacao.compilacao VerIsLid = false VerDtaLct = &sdtCompilacao.lancamento VerDtaUltSync = &sdtCompilacao.ultima_modificacao EndNew endfor endfor EndSub
Sub 'ImportaItensDaCompilacao' for &sdtCompilacao in &sdtVersionAPI.compilacoes for &sdtCompilacaoItem in &sdtCompilacao.itens for each order VerCod,VerItmCod where VerCod = &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao where VerItmCod = &sdtCompilacaoItem.codigo where VerItmTip = &sdtCompilacaoItem.tipo if &sdtCompilacao.isAtualizar VerItmTit = &sdtCompilacaoItem.titulo VerItmDsc = &sdtCompilacaoItem.descricao VerItmTar = &sdtCompilacaoItem.tarefa endif when none New VerCod = &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao VerItmCod = &sdtCompilacaoItem.codigo VerItmTip = &sdtCompilacaoItem.tipo VerItmTit = &sdtCompilacaoItem.titulo VerItmDsc = &sdtCompilacaoItem.descricao VerItmTar = &sdtCompilacaoItem.tarefa EndNew endfor endfor endfor EndSub
Sub 'SyncronizaLocalComNuvem' for each order VerCod &isExist = false for &sdtCompilacao in &sdtVersionAPI.compilacoes if &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao = VerCod &isExist = true endif endfor
if &isExist for each order VerCod,VerItmCod &isExist = false for &sdtCompilacao in &sdtVersionAPI.compilacoes if &sdtCompilacao.codigo_versao = VerCod for &sdtCompilacaoItem in &sdtCompilacao.itens if &sdtCompilacaoItem.codigo = VerItmCod and &sdtCompilacaoItem.tipo = VerItmTip &isExist = true exit endif endfor
if &isExist exit endif endif endfor
if not &isExist delete endif endfor else for each order VerCod,VerItmCod delete endfor delete endif endfor EndSub
